nasb.text: But they have not become contrite even to this day, nor have they feared nor walked in My law or My statutes, which I have set before you and before your fathers.” ’

esv.text: They have not humbled themselves even to this day, nor have they feared, nor walked in my law and my statutes that I set before you and before your fathers.

cnv.text: 直到今日，他們還沒有痛悔，沒有畏懼，也沒有遵行我在你們和你們列祖面前所立的律法和條例。’

ccb.text: 你们至今既不悔悟也不惧怕，不遵行我给你们和你们祖先设立的律法和诫命。
